projectDescription: A CLI tool for converting GitHub repositories into well-formatted PDF documents with syntax highlighting and customization options.
keyFeatures: Convert GitHub repositories to PDF with one command
Customizable output with line numbers, page numbers, and formatting
Support for both remote and local repositories
Flexible ignore patterns via repo2pdf.ignore file
Multiple PDF output modes (single file or one per source file)
Comment and empty line removal options
publicApiSurface: Clone repository mode - Clone and convert remote GitHub repos
Local repository mode - Convert local repositories to PDF
Feature flags: Add line numbers, Add highlighting, Add page numbers, Remove comments, Remove empty lines, One PDF per file
Output options: Single PDF file or directory of PDFs
